author: taulepton_
content: Yes, please feel free to merge. We have already discussed this internally within the team.

author: han0110
content: Sorry didn't see this earlier, the Airbender proof size bumps to 2222 KiB recently when we update it from 80-bits to 100-bits security, but this size should cover OpenVM and SP1.

author: taulepton_
content: ahhh I see. do you think we need to bump again to 2222 KiB? Or shall we ponder and consider how to proceed?

author: han0110
content:
not sure if we should bump again considering we have the others covered already and are closer to our standard.

but if we decide to bump again, perhaps we could just bump to ~4 MiB (for safety margin and the cost is ~2 extra sha256?) I think 4 MiB should be pretty enough in case any of zkVM needs to bump their proof size again 😅

author: jtraglia
content: Yeah I’d suggest doing 4MiB for now.

author: jtraglia
content: So we don’t keep bumping it 🙂
